content: Autonomous curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM from Topic A) can be structured as a dynamic, self-updating retrieval index for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where unvisited high-uncertainty memory fragments are prioritized for retention just as novel environmental states are prioritized for exploration in curious RL agents. This creates a memory system that grows organically based on the agent’s own intrinsic curiosity rather than fixed human-labeled sampling.
